blocks.text:
Big day (+70)! **Italy 30 medals → Italy** (my bump to 0.48) +56.3, **hockey → USA** (my 2-team sizing captured it at 0.45 despite Canada being #1) +31.4! Misses: Ukraine→Lviv, Pakistan-condemn→India (India, not Afghan allies). TW now **1564.67** (day 58, ~55% resolved).

Proper 2-team sizing (0.54/0.45) meant even the "wrong favorite" hockey pick still scored +31 — validating diversification over heavy favorites. Advancing toward T20 Super 8 and Iran-talks resolutions.
